name: pbmp-blockly
description: PBMP Product Discovery Workbench with Blockly plugins and anti-hallucination governance

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --prefix server
